attributes.name: isol_growth_condt
attributes.value: Seeds were germinated on soil and stratified in darkness at 4C for six days, after which they were transferred to long day conditions (16 h light) at 23C and 65% relative humidity under 110-140 umol m-2 s-1 light provided by Philips GreenPower TLED modules (Philips Lighting GmbH, Hamburg, Germany). To reduce starch accumulation, plants were placed into darkness for 24 h before harvesting.
